overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of Red Hood character running through a dark, rainy industrial Gotham City district at night. The character moves from under a covered overpass into open streets lined with factories, smokestacks, and neon-lit chemical plants.

agents.ego_description: sprinting beneath the dark industrial overpass, moving toward the distant exit

entered.detail: massive steel and concrete bridge overhead blocking the sky
illuminated signage on the right wall reading 'HITS CASINO'
dark colored sedan parked on the right side of the wet street

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a dimly lit industrial underpass with wet asphalt reflecting overhead lights. The 'HITS CASINO' sign glows on the right wall while the massive overpass structure dominates overhead, creating a claustrophobic corridor leading toward the open exit ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial district with factory buildings and smokestacks

events.description: exits the covered overpass into open industrial area with visible night sky
passing a bus stop shelter with illuminated 'ELLIOT' poster on the right

agents.ego_description: jogging through open misty streets, navigating around potholes while approaching the Royal building

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking near the factory smokestacks

entered.detail: large industrial building with purple neon 'ROYAL' signage and smokestacks
tall industrial chimneys billowing smoke against the night sky
glass and metal bus shelter with illuminated 'ELLIOT CENTER' advertisement
metal fencing running along the right side of the street
large brick warehouse building with multiple windows

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into the open industrial district, the Royal building looms on the left with purple neon signage. Smokestacks billow smoke against the dark blue night sky as the character passes a bus stop shelter and continues through the misty streets lined with chain-link fences.

scene_state.functional_zone: chemical factory complex entrance with neon signage

events.description: approaching the massive chemical factory with prominent orange neon flask signage
character slows pace while approaching the factory entrance plaza

agents.ego_description: approaching the destination factory complex, observing the neon-lit industrial structures ahead

notable_agents.action: figure standing near the factory entrance gate

entered.detail: massive industrial complex with multiple levels and glowing green windows
large orange neon sign depicting a laboratory flask
several vehicles parked along the right side near the factory
green neon signage on the left side of the factory complex

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive chemical factory complex dominated by a glowing orange neon flask symbol. Green neon signs illuminate the industrial facade as chain-link fences line the right side of the street, with the character moving toward the facility entrance where distant figures are visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial underpass into a sprawling, neon-lit chemical district. It begins beneath a massive overpass where wet asphalt reflects dim overhead lights and a glowing HITS CASINO sign lines the corridor. As the character emerges from the tunnel, the environment opens into a misty street where the Royal building looms with purple neon signage and smokestacks billow into a dark blue night sky. The scene then shifts toward a massive chemical factory complex, with the lighting transitioning from purple to vibrant green and orange hues. Finally, the camera follows the character past chain-link fences toward a facility entrance dominated by a glowing orange flask symbol and distant figures.
